name: Sugar and Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the shortening and sugar.
2. Add the egg; mix well.
3. Beat in the molasses.
4. Combine the dry ingredients; add to the creamed mixture and mix well.
5. Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls onto greased baking sheets.
6. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes.
7. Remove from wire racks and cool.
8. For frosting, cream the sugar, butter, and lemon peel in a mixing bowl.
9. Gradually add the lemon juice, beating until the frosting reaches the desired spreading consistency.
10. Frost the cookies.
